OPENCTI_URL.description: The URL of the OpenCTI platform.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope or type of data the connector is importing.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to wait between two connector runs (ISO-8601 duration format).

SOCPRIME_API_KEY.description: The SOC Prime CCM API Key.

SOCPRIME_CONTENT_LIST_NAME.description: Comma-separated content list names from which rules will be downloaded. At least one of content_list_name and job_ids must be provided.

SOCPRIME_INDICATOR_SIEM_TYPE.description: Security platform format in which rules will be downloaded. Applicable only to content_list_name.

SOCPRIME_JOB_IDS.description: Comma-separated job IDs from which rules will be downloaded. At least one of content_list_name and job_ids must be provided.

SOCPRIME_SIEM_TYPE.description: Security platform formats for which external links will be generated (comma-separated).

SOCPRIME_TLP_LEVEL.description: The TLP level to use for imported elements missing a TLP level.
